title: 7:15am Opening — FOH
items: FIRST THING! Wait sign and overhead menu board ‘Please wait to be seated’ sign needs.
SECOND! Turn on heater or cooler (depending on weather).
Ensure ALL TABLETS ARE ON AND ACTIVE AND CHARGING.
Wipe down ALL tables, and benches INDOOR AND OUTDOOR (ENSURE TABLES ARE AT THE RIGHT LOCATION).
Check floor: Sweep floor if it isn’t swept properly from the night before, including the ledge between decking & the glass wall.
PUT salt & pepper grinder, sugar, flowers on the table accordingly.
TAKE banana bread out WHEN taking milk out (tell chef to cut banana bread if need to cut new one).
FOUR TUBS for dirty dishes & cutleries: 1x ice cream (fill up with water and soap), 1x grey long tub (fill up with water and soap), 1x big white tub, 1x white tray.

PUT old RED and GREEN table wipes away and replace with new ones. GREEN TEA TOWEL: check the ‘cleaned towel container’ before putting it away, if there is just a few left, keep it! If there are still heaps, then replace with a new one.
ASK Chef's muffin’s flavour, and put the sign up.
POLISH cutlery if there is any needed to be polished.
Ensure display bench is presentable: menus (in front of computer, outside), cookies, banana bread, coffee loyalty card
